column1: and promoting best practices among guides across the country.
In  South  Korea,  TGs  are  regulated  under  a  national  licensing  system
overseen by the Ministry of Culture, Sports and Tourism (MCST). To
obtain a license, applicants, who must be South Korean citizens or hold
a valid work permit, are required to possess at least a bachelor’s degree,
preferably in fields such as Korean Studies or International Studies, and
pass a National TG qualification exam administered by the MCST. This exam covers essential
